since_last: 20% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads -0.29%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 20% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.53% · BTC -1.89% · Gold -2.16% · Nasdaq100 -2.38%. 20% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at -0.29%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.29%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.60%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.67%
cards.body: Leaders: HON +5.66%, AVAV +3.79%, MU +2.34%, SKHY +2.32%, GEV +1.70%. Laggards: TSLA -14.67%, GOOGL -7.61%, CRNC -7.22%, UPST -5.62%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.41% at $112.49
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.41% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
